author: Glenn
text:
Jude needs to do the same with his own token ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” each person sets their own on
   their own machine. Once it's set the red warning disappears and sessions   
  will save to GitHub.                                                        
                           1. GitHub ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ Settings ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ Developer settings ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ Personal access tokens ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ Tokens 
  (classic)                                                                   
  2. Click Generate new token (classic)
  3. Give it a name (e.g. "CGT Admin")                                        
  4. Check repo scope (full repo access)                    
  5. Generate ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ copy the token          
  6. Paste it into the Token field in CGT Admin ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ Save Token
